channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 11 of 2024 NFL season
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs lost their first game of the season last weekend. The Chiefs are now faced with the question of how far have they fallen in the NFL power rankings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers rookie Dalton Knecht hits 9 3-pointers in another outstanding perimeter performance
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dalton Knecht could only shrug when he buried his fourth consecutive 3-pointer and sent the Los Angeles Lakers ' entire arena into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NorCal girls volleyball roundup: Foothill, Archbishop Mitty, San Ramon Valley, Monta Vista advance to state title matches
item.description: NorCal girls volleyball roundup: Archbishop Mitty, Foothill, San Ramon Valley, Monta Vista advance to state title matches
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Kam Jones gets triple-double as No. 15 Marquette trounces No. 6 Purdue 76-58
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Kam Jones had 17 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists as No. 15 Marquette defeated No. 6 Purdue 76-58 on Tuesday night to snap the Boilermakers’ 39-game regular-season nonconference winning streak.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington school board begs state to keep trans athletes out of girls' sports after girls were affected
item.description: A school board in Washington passed a resolution urging its athletic conference to reconsider its stance on trans inclusion in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Los Angeles Sparks hire University of Utah coach Lynne Roberts to fill vacant head coach position
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Sparks have hired Utah coach Lynne Roberts to fill their vacant head coach position, the franchise announced Tuesday night. Roberts has spent the last nine-plus seasons at Utah and led the team to three straight NCAA Tournament berths.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Vogt wins AL Manager of the Year in first season
item.description: Vogt led the Guardians to a 92-69 record and the playoffs in his first season after replacing three-time manager of the year Terry Francona.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: After Nick Bosa celebration, ‘Trump dance’ takes sports world by storm
item.description: Days after Trump's reelection, the 49ers defensive end celebrated a sack in the team's win over Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: 76ers star Joel Embiid ripped in team meeting for being late to 'everything': report
item.description: After the Philadelphia 76ers fell to 2-11, they reportedly held a team meeting where Joel Embiid was called out for being late to "everything.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kickers are as good as ever these days, yet some of the NFL's true standouts are suddenly struggling
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — This is supposed to be a golden age for placekicking in the NFL. Try telling that to the fans in Baltimore, Philadelphia and Cincinnati right now.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jake Paul-Mike Tyson was highest-grossing combat event in Texas at $18.1M, organizers say
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jake Paul's unanimous decision over Mike Tyson was the highest-grossing combat sports event in Texas at $18.1 million, the promotions company co-founded by Paul said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gerardo 'Tata' Martino stepping down as coach of Lionel Messi's Inter Miami, AP source says
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Gerardo “Tata” Martino, who guided Inter Miami to the best regular season record in Major League Soccer history this season, is resigning as coach of the club, a person with knowledge of the decision said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaun White's new halfpipe league to air on NBC, Peacock
item.description: The new action-sports league being launched by Shaun White will air on NBC and stream on Peacock beginning next year. White announced earlier this year that he was putting together The Snow League, a four-stop circuit that will feature halfpipe snowboarding and freeskiing.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitals' Alex Ovechkin is week-to-week with a leg injury amid chase for NHL career goals record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin is considered week-to-week after injuring his lower left leg in the Washington Capitals’ most recent game at Utah, an absence that is expected to slow down his pursuit of Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets fire general manager Joe Douglas as woeful season drags on
item.description: The New York Jets' attempt to salvage another season has resulted in another major shakeup with reports indicating Tuesday that general manager Joe Douglas was fired more than halfway through his sixth season with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN star getting 'very, very worried' about Jerry Jones, has Joe Biden in mind
item.description: ESPN star Stephen A. Smith expressed concerns for Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones after the team's loss to the Houston Texans on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How California keeps transgender student athletes on the court as bans unfold across the country
item.description: California is becoming increasingly tangled in the nationwide fight over whether transgender college athletes should be allowed to compete on teams of their gender identity.
item.dc:creator: CalMatters, The Mercury News

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mountain West Conference determines there's insufficient evidence in volleyball Title IX complaint
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Mountain West Conference has concluded there was insufficient evidence to determine misconduct between women's volleyball players from the Colorado State and San Jose State programs ahead of a match last month after a coach filed a Title IX complaint alleging the student-ath
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The world's tallest teenager, 7-foot-9 Olivier Rioux, plans to redshirt at Florida this season
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The world’s tallest teenager might have to wait a year to become the world’s tallest college basketball player. Florida coach Todd Golden says Olivier Rioux, a 7-foot-9 freshman who owns a spot in the Guinness record book, is planning to redshirt.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks lose 3-1 in Seattle
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Jaden Schwartz scored on a power play 1:34 into the third period, and the Seattle Kraken pushed their winning streak to three games with a 3-1 win over the Chicago Blackhawks Thursday night. Matty Beniers and Brandon Tanev also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mike Tyson concedes the role of villain to young foe in 58-year-old's fight with Jake Paul
item.description: Friendship is at the heart of how a fight came together between 58-year-old former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and much younger YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Girls Volleyball: Cathedral 3, Los Alamitos 0
item.description: The Lady Dons take on the Griffins of Los Alamitos in the first round of the 2024 CIF Open Division Championships.
item.dc:creator: Joaquin Duncan, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC
